The 'buildComments' function manages comment extraction based on user-provided options, converting various conditions into functions for preserve/extract logic. The 'minify' function takes input files and options, constructs Uglify options, optionally incorporates source maps, and calls 'uglify-es' to perform minification, returning the result along with extracted comments. Throughout, the code maintains standard patterns for input handling and does not perform any network requests, data leaks, or system modifications.
